title: Structure
text: Structure The Structure pane displays the hierarchical structure of the menu. Use it to navigate to the menu object you want to edit. Table 1. Structure Window Menu Options Item Description Cut Cut the currently selected item. Copy Copy the currently selected item. Paste Paste the previously cut or copied item. Find Add Manual Tag Display the Properties forms for the component. Clear Manual Tags Display the Properties forms for the entity. Delete Manual Tag Display the Properties forms for the field.
